title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of the enterprise search company Glean now valued at $7 billion, discusses his founding principles after already building a unicorn. He emphasizes strategic focus and competitive differentiation over model scale or investor appeal.
